 Direct Access
emails.body: RE: AReM/WPTF Comments on Draft Decisions Regarding PX Credit and Direct Access Robert, We should talk to Mike Day about it we need to preserve our rights for future litigation, but perhaps we only need to file for rehearing to do that. I'll give Mike a call. Sue Mara Enron Corp. Tel: (415) 782-7802 Fax:(415) 782-7854 Robert C Williams/ENRON@enronXgate 06/22/2001 07:49 AM

emails.subject:
AReM/WPTF Comments on Draft Decisions Regarding PX Credit and
 Direct Access
emails.subject_base:
AReM/WPTF Comments on Draft Decisions Regarding PX Credit and
 Direct Access
emails.body: AReM/WPTF Comments on Draft Decisions Regarding PX Credit and Direct Access Dan Douglass has drafted joint comments for two coalitions in which Enron is a member Alliance for Retail Energy Markets and Western Power Trading Forum. Robert, feel free to contact Dan directly with your comments. Let me know your thoughts as well. I am out of the office at a WPTF meeting. Dan is here as well. If you need to contact me, you can leave me a message on my office phone or try my cell (415 902-4108), but I'm not sure the cell is working all the time. Sue Mara Enron Corp. Tel: (415) 782-7802 Fax:(415) 782-7854 Forwarded by Susan J Mara/NA/Enron on 06/22/2001 07:35 AM "Dan Douglass" <douglass@energyattorney.com> 06/20/2001 10:59 PM
